case_title: DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. VS. CHIH-YEH CHEN MD et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. SERVED MAR-14-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN MD, CHIH-YEH AKA CHIH-YIH FRANK CHEN M.D.
